fieldref_t Struct Reference

#include <constantpool.h>

Data Fields

uint16_t class_index
 Index of the class.
uint16_t name_and_type_index
 Name-and-type index of the ref.

Detailed Description

Represents a CONSTANT_Fieldref_info structure, but also a CONSTANT_Methodref_info structure or a CONSTANT_InterfaceMethodref structure
